channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th May
item.description:
Please collect asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mountgrove Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing cycle parking bollard, 10th May
item.description:
Please replace reflective signage / bollard to protect parked bicycles. Notice holes on the ground where it has been removed / knocked. This narrow junction is problematic and should be narrowed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 10th May
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106-168, Bell Green Lane, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped, 10th May
item.description:
Dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Kinver Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garage corner of Linale House /Dumping Items, 10th May
item.description:
Garage in corner of Linale House forecourt/N1 7QH Users of Garage/Not Residents of Linale House have empitied their Garage and have dumped items by Bin Area of Linale House Which then allows other to dump their items by Linale Bin Area .

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Murray Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped cars, 10th May
item.description:
Dumped cars

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 10th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kangley Bridge Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped at top of streer, 10th May
item.description:
Has been there for 24 hours now, please remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M&S shopping trolley and scooter dumped in river, 10th May
item.description:
Scooter has been there awhile shopping trolley recently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66,68, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More bins needed for HMO, 10th May
item.description:
Overflowing bins again at number 20 - this is a HMO and there are clearly not adequate facilities for the amount of people living in the property- please can the council arrange more.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saunders Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street road sign pulled up, 10th May
item.description:
Street sign has been pulled up and left lying Other road signs also vandalised nearby
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builder have dumped their rubbish here again, 10th May
item.description:
You collected a similar pile earlier this week, but another builder, or the same, has dumped their waste here again. Hackney put up a sign saying no dumping which stopped residents but builders continue to swing by and dump their rubbish in this spot.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Springdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking sign, 10th May
item.description:
Parking sign someone kerps turning it around so they can park there all day needs fix on the left hand side just passed sainsburys
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Spring Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking sign, 10th May
item.description:
Someone keeps turning the parking sign atound so they can park they car there all day the sign needs to be fixed just as u go up derby hill right hand side
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32-34, Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed, 10th May
item.description:
Untaxed for two years dumped on dartmouth road front number plate removed rear one half covered by tape removed tape untaxed for two year time to removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Dartmouth Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Asaph Road, Nunhead, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti and flypostering, 10th May

item.title: Street light day burning, 10th May
item.description:
Evelina Road by Railway Bridge Street light column 12 is day burning This has been reported before and still appears to have an issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evelina Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
